texto: I was scripting for a series on the Arts programme which was shown very late on a Sunday evening, and I was sent off to get the low down on several up and coming musicians who would be featured each week. To the music world, they may have been up and coming, I would have preferred them to be down and going and preferably out of range.
explicacao: Citação de Lucinda E. Clarke sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I was scripting for a series on the Arts programme which was shown very late on a Sunday evening,…” articula reflexao, africa, memoir em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e memoir.

frase_original: I was scripting for a series on the Arts programme which was shown very late on a Sunday evening, and I was sent off to get the low down on several up and coming musicians who would be featured each week. To the music world, they may have been up and coming, I would have preferred them to be down and going and preferably out of range.
